display.purpose: Hero headlines and emotional trip framing only.

body.purpose: Inputs, lists, autocomplete, and UI chrome.

shadows.name: resting-card
shadows.purpose: Search shell and subtle cards at rest (shadow-sm).

motion.name: transition-colors
motion.purpose: Default interactive state crossfade for buttons and links.

motion.name: transition-transform-slow
motion.purpose: Hero image scale on card hover only where specified.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA inside search module and equivalent commit actions.
components.html: <button type="button" class="ds-btn-primary">Search<svg class="ds-btn-primary__icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M2 8a.75.75 0 0 1 .75-.75h8.69L8.22 4.03a.75.75 0 0 1 1.06-1.06l4.5 4.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.06l-4.5 4.5a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06-1.06l3.22-3.22H2.75A.75.75 0 0 1 2 8Z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: #2563eb; color: #ffffff; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-btn-primary__icon { width: 0.875rem; height: 0.875rem; }

components.name: Outline Chip
components.description: Quick destination or event shortcuts under the search shell.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-chip:hover { color: #2563eb; border-color: #2563eb; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Desktop Nav Link
components.description: TopNav text links for Saved Trips and Profile.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-block; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #0f172a; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #2563eb; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Account Icon Button
components.html: <button type="button" class="ds-account" aria-label="Account menu"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" class="ds-account__svg" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M18 10a8 8 0 11-16 0 8 8 0 0116 0zm-5.5-2.5a2.5 2.5 0 11-5 0 2.5 2.5 0 015 0zM10 12a5.99 5.99 0 00-4.793 2.39A6.483 6.483 0 0010 16.5a6.483 6.483 0 004.793-2.11A5.99 5.99 0 0010 12z" clip-rule="evenodd" /></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-account { width: 2.25rem; height: 2.25rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgb(37 99 235 / 0.1); color: #2563eb; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-account:hover { background: rgb(37 99 235 / 0.2); } .ds-account:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-account__svg { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; }

components.name: Search Shell
components.description: Unified mode selector, fields, and submit in one rounded container.
components.css: .ds-search-shell { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: stretch; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); min-height: 3.5rem; } .ds-search-shell__label { font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; padding: 1rem; }

narrative.overview:
YourWeekend reads as a bright, approachable trip companion: cool page wash, white surfaces, and a single electric blue accent that marks progress, selection, and the primary action. Playfair Display carries emotional headlines and section titles; Inter carries UI chrome, inputs, and dense copy. Density stays product-comfortable: generous radius on the hero search module, soft dropdowns, and quick-pick chips that feel tappable, not corporate.

The system rejects generic SaaS monoculture called out in PRODUCT.md: no purple-gradient heroes, no decorative gradient text, no identical icon-title-card grids as the default layout language, and no modal-first flows where inline steps would be clearer. Warmth shows up as clear hierarchy, friendly microcopy slots, and serif personality on hero moments, not as noisy decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained accent discipline — blue signals action, verification, and selection; neutrals carry structure.
Serif for story, sans for work — display moments are editorial; forms and nav stay utilitarian.
Soft containment — rounded-2xl shells and shadow-sm / shadow-lg separate layers without heavy skeuomorphism.
Three modes, one chrome — mode switcher, inputs, and submit share one search bar vocabulary across plan, event, and inspire.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Strong blue appears where the user commits or orients: CTAs, selected rows, verified state, text links. Do not spray mid-blue as large background fields on whole sections.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black Rule
rules.body: Text and borders use slate neutrals, not #000, keeping the cool mist page harmonious.

rules.name: The Serif Containment Rule
rules.body: Playfair is for hero and selective section headers, not for buttons, labels, or table data.

rules.name: The Flat Page Rule
rules.body: The page background stays flat; elevation belongs to interactive layers (menus, cards, shell) that sit above it.

dos: Do keep the mist page + white surface + blue action triangle for new screens so the app stays recognizable in planning moments.
Do use Playfair for hero and major section titles, Inter for everything interactive or data-dense.
Do use primary/10 washes for selected rows and active mobile nav items, reserving solid primary for one primary CTA per view where possible.
Do respect PRODUCT.md: three modes, one product — shared search-bar anatomy for plan, event, and inspire.
donts: Don't lean into Generic SaaS / "AI product" monoculture as defined in PRODUCT.md: purple-gradient hero clichés, identical icon+title+card grids as the default pattern, side-stripe accent borders as fake structure, gradient text on headings, or modal-first flows when progressive inline steps would serve trust better.
Don't produce interchangeable template travel UIs: avoid layouts that could be swapped with any other category app by changing the logo alone.
Don't set body or long UI copy in Playfair; it erodes scanning for dates, cities, and prices.
Don't use pure #000 or #fff as system-wide text or page colors; stay on the defined slate and mist tokens.
